programme.desc: Frasier and Lilith are on Bora-Bora with their new lovers, but let competitiveness get the better of them causing Madeline to leave early. Frasier apologises on air and Madeline agrees to another date, but Lilith unexpectedly turns up yet again.

programme.title: Frasier: Burying a Grudge
programme.desc: Frasier tries to heal the 20 year rift between Martin and Artie Walsh, his old partner on the force, after seeing Artie in the hospital.

programme.title: Frasier: Seat of Power
programme.desc: After Frasier and Niles fail at fixing Frasier's leaking toilet, they call a plumber. Much to their horror, the plumbers turn out to be Frasier and Niles's high school tormentors, the Kriezel brothers.

programme.title: Frasier: Roz in the Doghouse
programme.desc: Bulldog asks Roz to become his producer, and she accepts despite Frasier's protests that Bulldog is only trying to seduce her.

programme.title: Frasier: Retirement Is Murder
programme.desc: Martin tries to solve an old murder case that he's been unable to close for years, which involves a prostitute, a cop and a monkey.

programme.title: Frasier: Fool Me Once, Shame on You, Fool Me Twice
programme.desc: Someone steals Frasier's briefcase, his dry-cleaning, his car, and his identity. Then the conniving man goes around Seattle impersonating him.

programme.title: Reba: He's Having a Baby
programme.desc: Reba argues with Brock when she runs into him and Barbra Jean in childbirth class.

programme.title: Reba: She Works Hard for Their Money
programme.desc: Reba insists that she and Van pay for a car that is given to him by Brock.

programme.title: Reba: Labor of Love
programme.desc: Brock tells Reba that he is skipping his camping trip because Barbra Jean is pregnant.

programme.title: Reba: The King and I
programme.desc: Cheyenne and Van are nominated for king and queen of their high school prom.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Family Affair
programme.desc: A generational clash occurs when Dorothy's son Michael and Rose's daughter Bridget visit.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Vacation
programme.desc: The girls' dream vacation in the Caribbean turns out to be far from what was advertised in the brochure. While the girls are away, Sophia romances the gardener.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Joust Between Friends
programme.desc: Laid off from work, Dorothy searches for part-time work which leads to Blanche getting her a job at the museum. Then fur flies when Dorothy is handed the job of organizing a banquet, the duty Blanche was hoping for.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Love, Rose
programme.desc: Rose places an ad in the personals column and she is let down when she doesn't hear an immediate response. This leads Blanche and Dorothy to begin responding under the name Isaac Newton.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: 'Twas the Nightmare Before Christmas
programme.desc: The girls each plan to spend Christmas with their families but a series of strange occurrences lead them to spend Christmas together in Miami.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Sisters
programme.desc: As a birthday present for Sophia, Dorothy brings Sophia's sister over from Sicily.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: Country music star Jana Kramer and former NFL player Mike Caussin are in the house to discuss their book 'The Good Fight.' And sit down with actress and author Cat Deeley.

programme.title: Movie: Rome in Love
programme.desc: An unknown actress lands the role of a lifetime in Rome. Paired with an American journalist writing a profile, she will discover surprises about love and life in the eternal city.

programme.title: Movie: Bound and Babysitting
programme.desc: A woman is forced to baby-sit with her college nemesis and begins to see him in a new light.

programme.title: The Office
programme.desc: A documentary-style look at the daily lives of office workers at a mid-sized paper company.

programme.title: The Office: Here Comes Treble
programme.desc: It's Halloween at the office and Andy invites his college a capella group to perform. Dwight searches for evidence of a madman loose in the office.

programme.title: The Office: The Boat
programme.desc: Andy must man up when his Dad blows all the family money. When Dwight is interviewed on local radio, Jim and the office torture him with bizarre call ins.

programme.title: The Office: The Whale
programme.desc: Dwight finds himself needing to be able to sell to women so Pam and the ladies help him out.

programme.title: The Office: The Target
programme.desc: Angela discovers her husband's affair with Oscar and goes to Dwight for help. Jim needs a favour from Stanley and Phyllis who milk it for all it's worth.

programme.title: The Office: Lice
programme.desc: Pam accidentally brings lice into the office and lets Meredith take the fall. Meanwhile, Jim has a fantastic day in Philly wooing a potential business associate.

programme.title: The Office: Suit Warehouse
programme.desc: Dwight and Clark pose as a father and son in order to sell a suit warehouse.

programme.title: The Office: Customer Loyalty
programme.desc: Dwight tries to prevent Darryl from moving to Athlead; Jim misses Cece's recital when a big investor visits his new company.

programme.title: The Office: Junior Salesman
programme.desc: David tasks Dwight with finding a new part time salesman to fill in for Jim. Meanwhile, Pam tries to figure out who will be her new desk mate and Erin tries to find her birth parents with Pete's help.

programme.title: The Office: Vandalism
programme.desc: When Pam asks the office to help her track down the vandal who defaced her mural, Dwight and Nellie spring to action. Darryl has difficulty dealing with the cleanliness habits of Jim in their shared Philly apartment.

programme.title: The Office: Couples Discount
programme.desc: The office pairs off into pretend couples to take advantage of a Valentine's Day discount at a local mini mall.

programme.title: The Office: Moving On
programme.desc: Pam interviews for a job in Philadelphia with a manager who gives her deja vu. Dwight brings Angela with him on a mission to clean his elderly Aunt Shirley.

programme.title: The Office: Moving On
programme.desc: Pam interviews for a job in Philadelphia with a manager who gives her deja vu. Dwight brings Angela with him on a mission to clean his elderly Aunt Shirley.

programme.title: The Office: The Farm
programme.desc: Dwight travels home for a customary Schrute funeral. He and his siblings receive a surprise inheritance that's not entirely unwelcome. Back at Dunder Mifflin, Todd Packer tries to make amends for his lifetime of bad behaviour.

programme.title: The Office: Promos
programme.desc: Everyone is excited about the new promos running on TV for the documentary. Jim interviews a baseball player.

programme.title: The Office: Stairmageddon
programme.desc: Everyone is upset when the elevator goes out of service and they must take the stairs.

programme.title: South Park: The Death of Eric Cartman
programme.desc: Cartman is sure he's dead and Butters is sure that Eric Cartman's ghost is haunting him. Together they attempt to make amends to all the people Cartman has wronged over the years.

programme.title: South Park: Royal Pudding
programme.desc: The Prince of Canada is about to take a Princess and Ike is obsessed with the Royal Wedding.

programme.title: South Park: Lice Capades
programme.desc: When Mrs. Garrison refuses to name names about an infestation of head lice that plagues South Park Elementary, Cartman finds a way to detect who has lice.

programme.title: South Park: The New Terrance and Phillip Movie Trailer
programme.desc: All the kids in South Park are glued to the TV, wild with anticipation to see the first trailer for the latest Terrance and Phillip movie.

programme.title: South Park: Make Love, Not Warcraft
programme.desc: The actions of a renegade gamer threaten to destroy Blizzard Entertainment's World of Warcraft. The fate of the game now lies in the hands of Cartman and the gang who dedicate their lives to defeating the mad gamer and saving the World of Warcraft.

programme.title: South Park: Butters' Bottom Bitch
programme.desc: Butters is determined to get his first kiss so his friends won't make fun of him anymore. Soon he's running his own ring of girls who will kiss for money and runs into trouble with some pimps.

programme.title: South Park: More Crap
programme.desc: Stan's dad Randy becomes South Park's hometown hero when the guys down at the local bar see the size of his most recent crap. Drunk with his new-found fame, Randy attempts to break a world set by Bono.

programme.title: South Park: Ike's Wee Wee
programme.desc: Mr. Mackey, the school counsellor, is fired and turns to drugs and alcohol. Meanwhile, when the boys find out what it means to be circumcised they try to save Ike from his Bris.

programme.title: South Park: Two Days Before the Day After Tomorrow
programme.desc: After a global warming state of emergency is declared in South Park, the world's largest beaver dam breaks and floods the town of Beaverton. The people of South Park must figure out who they can blame before anyone can be saved in the adjacent town.

programme.title: South Park: Wing
programme.desc: The boys set up the 'Awesome Talent Agency' and pool all their resources to impress their first client only to have an agency run by the Chinese Mafia steal her away.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Just Push Play
programme.desc: A singer and guitar player is brutally and mysteriously stabbed in a bar. As details emerge in the case, the squad soon realizes that the victim had something to hide. Meanwhile, Jane's dad returns with shocking news.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Food for Thought

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: You're Gonna Miss Me When I'm Gone
programme.desc: Homeland security steps in when a senator's daughter is found murdered. The squad rushes to solve the case, which could put national security at risk. Meanwhile, Tommy starts slipping back into old habits and Jane reveals shocking news.

programme.desc: A wealthy businessman hires a free-spirited call girl to be his companion for a week. Slowly they draw things from each other and from within themselves that make them hope against their own sceptical nature for a fairy tale ending.

programme.desc: After being dumped by her future husband, an unconventional educator sets out to marry a rich substitute teacher. While battling for his attention and being pursued by the gym teacher, she teaches her class, and everyone else a unique type of lesson.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life

programme.title: Designing Spaces: Remote Solutions for Home Offices
programme.desc: Working from home made easy with call-tracking technology, cloud communication solutions, project management tools and home office set-ups.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Who's Zoomin' Who
programme.desc: An outbreak of a sexually transmitted disease affects some of the hospital staff.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Raindrops Keep Falling on My Head
programme.desc: Meredith learns about Derek's other relationship; Christina is confused about Dr. Burke.

programme.title: The Closer: Good Housekeeping
programme.desc: An illegal immigrant's daughter is murdered; a cruel twist sends the investigation back to square one.

programme.title: The Closer: The Butler Did It
programme.desc: The crew investigates when a wealthy woman dies months after she marries a young stripper and her butler commits suicide.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Under the Influence
programme.desc: A meddling television writer-producer accompanies Sanchez and Tao on a ride-along so he can get an inside look at the LAPD but the day gets quickly out of hand. Meanwhile, Rusty employs some unfair help when his teacher makes him re-write an essay.

programme.title: Major Crimes: I, Witness
programme.desc: The LAPD flies a material witness into Los Angeles to testify, but, in a horrible turn of events, the witness winds up as the key suspect in an entirely new murder.

programme.title: Major Crimes: D.O.A
programme.desc: The squad investigates a brutal murder, but they soon find that dark secrets are at the root of an apparent drug bust gone wrong.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Food for Thought
programme.desc: A detective and a medical examiner join forces to solve Boston's most twisted cases.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Neighbors: Blood and Terror
programme.desc: When a gay rights activist is stabbed to death in his own apartment, police are tasked with tracking down his killer, and in the process, they uncover a dark world of paranoia and delusions lurking in the heart of London.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Neighbors: Nightmare Next Door
programme.desc: When Jason Horsley is gunned down in front of his home, investigators discover evidence of a neighbor’s deadly plotting, but it would take six years to track the killer down.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Neighbors: Sinister Surveillance
programme.desc: When a Tennessee man is shot down in front of his own home, police use home video to unravel the history of a vicious feud between rural neighbours and determine if the shooting was self-defence or cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Millionaires: Cashed Out
programme.desc: When a mother of six is viciously slain in her Sarasota home, police wonder if her wealthy ex-husband might have been involved in the crime?

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Millionaires: Bombs and Betrayal
programme.desc: Tucson, Arizona society is blown away when a car bomb explodes outside of an exclusive country club, but when the case goes cold, will investigators be able to find their suspect?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Muffled Cries
programme.desc: An attractive university student was forcibly abducted from a mall parking lot and never seen alive again.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Critical Manoeuvre
programme.desc: A truck driver claims the life of a high school football standout and flees the scene. Fortunately, a trace evidence expert examines paint particles found near the accident and leads investigators to the man behind the wheel.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Traffic Violations
programme.desc: When a young woman is found dead police immediately focus their attention on her husband. Not until they examine cell phone records and a unique shoe print do they realize the real killer has been a bit too close for comfort the entire time.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Brotherly Love
programme.desc: A young man devotes his life to law enforcement after his sister is brutally murdered. In the end, a brother's love - and a new scientific tool - unlocks the mystery behind an age old case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Frozen Assets
programme.desc: When a respected business owner is brutally attacked and killed, investigators have to determine if it was a robbery gone wrong or a calculated murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: House Hunting
programme.desc: When a successful real estate agent is brutally murdered, panicked townspeople begin looking over their shoulders and locking their doors.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sunday School Ambush
programme.desc: Forensic science helps investigators unravel a twisted tale of lust, greed and deception.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Penchant for Poison
programme.desc: Three seemingly unrelated deaths proved to be serial murders. The killer had been careful; he used poison which has no taste or odor. Fortunately for investigators, it also had a unique chemical signature.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bump in the Night
programme.desc: Investigators find a shoe impression in the mud outside a victim's home that they hope will lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sole Searching
programme.desc: It's not only a fingerprint which can link a killer to a crime; a shoe print can be just as telling. Armed with little else, police hoped the shoe impressions found at a Lansing, Michigan crime scene would put their investigation back on track.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sharper Image
programme.desc: After a girl was killed, investigators learn that cutting-edge technologies from NASA prove that the arrested suspect was not the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Insulated Evidence
programme.desc: A young college student is found strangled and badly burned. Investigators get a break when a trace evidence expert uncovers the murder weapon in the spool of a vacuum.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Hearted
programme.desc: After a man dies with no proof of foul play, investigators learn that another man died the exact same way six years earlier. The men had one thing in common: at the time of their deaths, they were married to the same woman.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wheel of Misfortune
programme.desc: A woman's disappearance is tracked by a casino's security cameras. Investigators collect enough evidence left behind from the victim to inform them of who was responsible and how she disappeared.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Valentine
programme.desc: An obstetrician tried unsuccessfully to revive a man's wife who he found covered in blood.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Picture This
programme.desc: A teenage girl is found dead 20 miles from her home after police believed she ran away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Oily in the Morning
programme.desc: Police recover a submerged car, but don't find the missing man they were looking for.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Gold Rush
programme.desc: A man calls 911 saying his girlfriend shot herself, but the autopsy reveals that the gunshot wound was not self-inflicted.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade
programme.desc: A daily dose of news, weather, sports, entertainment, finance and travel, in a fast paced, approachable style.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nice Threads
programme.desc: A woman was found dead on the bedroom floor of her apartment. The crime scene yielded little of value, and investigators wondered if they would find enough evidence to make a case, much less catch a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grave Danger
programme.desc: A young man dies in a mysterious car crash, but was it an accident? Forensic science uncovered what really caused the crash, and the truth devastated three different families.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Van-ished
programme.desc: A twelve-year-old girl claimed she had been abducted and sexually assaulted. She recounted what happened in such a flat, unemotional voice that police found it difficult to believe her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Novel Idea
programme.desc: When a frantic call from a man claiming his wife fell down the stairs brings investigators to their home, they are concerned by the unusually large number of bloodstains, and how big they are.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Head Games
programme.desc: To celebrate one year of marriage, a young couple goes on a camping trip. When the husband is shot and killed, the wife is so distraught she gives two different stories of what happened. When forensic psychiatry intervenes, the truth is finally learned.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Making the Collar
programme.desc: A 16-year-old girl goes missing, and nine months later, her body is found. Forensic scientists narrow it down to a postal worker with a dog and red carpet, just with the evidence found on the girl's body.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cop Out
programme.desc: A college student is found dead and the evidence suggests he knew his killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Summer Obsession
programme.desc: In an affluent suburb of Philadelphia, police are called to the scene of what appears to be an accidental drowning.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Murder on the Menu
programme.desc: When a Philadelphia restaurateur is murdered, the police sift through the usual suspects to find his killer. They soon uncover a sprawling web of deceit and debt.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hot on the Trail
programme.desc: Investigators get involved after a serial arsonist begins starting blazes all over Washington DC.

programme.title: BattleBots: I'm Here to Kick Some Bot
programme.desc: The competition for the 2018 Battlebots World Championship gets fierce when Bronco and Lock-Jaw fight to the death.

programme.title: BattleBots: Ice, Ice, Baby
programme.desc: BattleBots elites Icewave square off against Skorpios in an epic throwdown, while the rest of the bots battle to secure their spots in the Sweet 16.

programme.title: BattleBots: Blood, Sweat and Gears
programme.desc: Former Giant Nut winner Tombstone takes on rookie Slap Box and the part-frog, part-killer robot Ribbot takes on the feline-inspired MadCatter. Giant walker-bot Chomp makes its debut and End Game takes on Bloodsport in a messy main event.

programme.title: BattleBots: Sin City Slasher
programme.desc: Last season's runner-up Witch Doctor faces Kraken: both are winless and desperate for victory. Vegas newcomer Jackpot rolls the dice against veteran Ghost Raptor and flipper Hydra has an enormous surprise in store for HUGE.

programme.title: BattleBots: Return of the Bots
programme.desc: Hard-hitting, steel-splitting combat returns as 60 teams converge for a tournament of all-out robotic carnage! Jack Barker from End Game finally gets the match he's been waiting for as he squares off with Ray Billings and his lethal bot Tombstone.

programme.title: BattleBots: Sin City Slasher
programme.desc: Last season's runner-up Witch Doctor faces Kraken: both are winless and desperate for victory. Vegas newcomer Jackpot rolls the dice against veteran Ghost Raptor and flipper Hydra has an enormous surprise in store for HUGE.

programme.title: BattleBots: Return of the Bots
programme.desc: Hard-hitting, steel-splitting combat returns as 60 teams converge for a tournament of all-out robotic carnage! Jack Barker from End Game finally gets the match he's been waiting for as he squares off with Ray Billings and his lethal bot Tombstone.

programme.title: Undercover Billionaire: Trial by Fire
programme.desc: Glenn sinks everything into Underdog BBQ's big debut and first chance to make money. But before the cash register even opens, the team's plan goes up in flames, threatening the future of the company before the 90-day deadline.

programme.title: Undercover Billionaire: Final Reckoning
programme.desc: Glenn's 90 days are up and it's time to find out if his business is worth a million dollars. But first, Glenn reveals his true identity to his team as well as what each one of them has earned for their part of Underdog BBQ.

programme.title: Undercover Billionaire: Three Million Dollar Bet
programme.desc: With just $100 in their pockets, three business titans are dropped in unfamiliar cities, stripped of their names, money, and contacts and given a simple challenge: build a $1 million business in just 90 days.

programme.title: Undercover Billionaire: Comeback City: Big Pivot, Big Profit
programme.desc: Self-made billionaire Glenn Stearns reveals what it takes to save a struggling business when he's called on to rescue Tipsy Bean, an Erie coffee shop with huge potential but suffering from a fatal flaw.

programme.title: Gold Rush: On the Gold
programme.desc: The Hoffman crew can finally do their first clean-out of the season now that the wash plant has been prepped. Parker is forced to run his grandfather's safety dirt.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dead in the Water
programme.desc: An excavator needs emergency surgery after getting stranded in the creek. The crew fine-tunes their wash plant.

programme.title: Gold Rush: The Jungle
programme.desc: In Guyana, South Africa, Todd leads his team through snake-infested jungle and deadly rivers.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Up Smith Creek
programme.desc: Todd Hoffman faces closure if he fails to get 100 ounces of gold for his investor. The Dakota Boys believe they have finally found the elusive Glory Hole while Parker Schnabel uncovers the mystery of Smith Creek just as his grandpa reveals bad news.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Hundreds of Ounces
programme.desc: The Hoffman crew makes a desperate bid to hit their season goal. Tony's attempt to run his million dollar gold dredge ends in a shipwreck. Parker fights the big freeze as he pushes to hit his 2.4 million dollar goal.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Moving the Monster
programme.desc: Todd encounters big issues as he attempts to move his 50 ton washplant. Tony's dredge finally starts producing gold. Parker piles on the pressure and it proves to be too much for one of his young crew members.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Colorado Strikes Back
programme.desc: Todd shuts down his operations to support Freddy Dodge as he pleads with the county commissioners to allow him to mine his claim. Parker suffers as Rick's attempt to mine more horribly backfires. Tony's dredge is losing gold so son Kevin is forced to act.

programme.title: Tallest Teens
programme.desc: Meet three of the tallest teenagers in America and learn how they fit into a society designed for people several feet shorter and how will their size impact their future.

programme.title: 30 Inches Tall and Turning 18
programme.desc: Georgia Rankin is an average teenager at the height of an average two-year-old. Measuring 2 feet 7 inches tall, she's charismatic, and happy, despite suffering constant pain in her joints. We follow Georgia for a year as she seeks medical treatment.

programme.title: Extraordinary People: World's Smallest Woman: Meet Jyoti
programme.desc: Meet Jyoti Amge, the smallest woman in the world. At 24 inches tall and a mere 12 pounds, Jyoti is in the U.S. for work and to explore American culture. She also hopes to find a doctor for a serious health issue her two broken legs.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Warning: Cystem Shutdown!

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Rubbed the Wrong Way
programme.desc: Find out why the food court was picked for the 'stalk and text' challenge, what classic comedy inspired 'over the shoulder,' and who was lucky enough to test out the flying contraption for Joe the Genie.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Baggage Shame
programme.desc: Find out how Murr's old neighbour learns a little TMI about his personal life and which of the jokers Joe would want by his side in a fight.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Flatfoot the Pirate
programme.desc: Who made the call to give Murr a face full of slushie at the mall? How did the Jokers keep their props secret from each other before Laugh Man Standing? And whose breast milk did Pirate Sal chug?

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Quantum Mock-Anics
programme.desc: Find out which joker gets dizzy when a cab has a strong air freshener, who can speak Spanish, and which joker struggles to keep a straight face during Joe's 'expert' punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Remember the Pact
programme.desc: Find out how many mousetraps accidentally went off during Q's turn in 'hold this please,' what made Joe and Murr join 'team skins' in Columbus park, and how Murr's tech punishment made show history.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Spider Man
programme.desc: Find out which of the jokers is the handiest, who hates the taste of beer, and how Q's love of animals beat out his arachnophobia and made for a better punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Walking Dread
programme.desc: Find out which joker has a black thumb, what challenges the guys like so much they play when the cameras are off, and how long it took to zombie-fry the undead in Sal's sewer punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Party Crasher
programme.desc: Find out which jokers were in on the surprise Gary Busey appearance, where the phrase 'tit for tat' came from, and how Murr's big mouth backfired on him, leading to this Statue of Liberty punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Card Against Humanity
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal have customers seeing red while working at an optician's office, then get too close for comfort eavesdropping on strangers' conversations. Plus, the big loser gives the business at a networking event.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Chick Magnet
programme.desc: The guys turn on the charm to make a restaurant basement sound enticing and recruit unsuspecting shoppers to shout out bizarre nicknames. Then, tonight's big loser must find his way out of the cuckoo's nest before the chicks get crazy.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Bogey Man
programme.desc: The laughing gas flows freely when the guys pose as dental assistants. Later, they make headlines for all the wrong reasons, and get burned giving some campfire tips. Plus, tonight’s big loser scores a hole in none on the links.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: The guys try and work out the kinks as physical therapists, then pitch some way out-of-the-box ideas for TV hosts. Plus, the big loser gets rolled over by some speedy ladies.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Four Meals, One Color Episode
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Sal and Joe eat a meal that can only be one color, and Patty Jenkins helps determine if Murr is a bad husband.

programme.title: Top Secret Videos: How to Save a Life
programme.desc: This episode features a fistfight between man and kangaroo, a nasty nun-chucks nut job and a doorbell-cam date interrogation. Plus, the Interns deal with questions of life and death.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Crash Test Dummies
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q take some customers for a wild ride, and things get messy when they ask fellow shoppers for a hand. Plus, the big losers suffer a monster punishment that leaves them crushed.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Closer
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr get tech help from some confused tutors, then play hot potato in a shoe store. Plus, the big loser wishes he could press 'escape' during a brutal coffee shop punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Full Mental Jacket
programme.desc: Joe, Murr, Q and Sal send blood pressure rates sky-high while posing as nurses, then stroll through the store with their wives. Plus, the big loser wishes he could check out early at a pop-up fashion show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Dumbbell
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr test their parental instincts by reading their daughters' diaries, then give presentations that are anything but normal. Later, tonight's big loser gets painfully honest with bodybuilders at the gym.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Four Meals, One Color Episode
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Sal and Joe eat a meal that can only be one color, and Patty Jenkins helps determine if Murr is a bad husband.

programme.title: Top Secret Videos: How to Save a Life

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Needy and the Greedy
programme.desc: A behind the scenes look at the location that refused to let the Jokers film, Joe's injury from being thrown into a tower of cereal and why Q was called a 'loose cannon'.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: To Hatch a Predator
programme.desc: A last-minute prop request that caused a scramble, where Murr’s fetching housecoat came from, and who was offered a job at the children’s museum following Q’s turtle punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Get Out of Dodge
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes to find out which Joker used to run a business and how Rosie O'Donnell became a fan of the show. Plus, find out how Murr surprised the guys on the set.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Truth Hurts
programme.desc: Find out which challenge became an instant classic, what act of kindness blew the crew away and what word the Jokers are responsible for in Urban Dictionary.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: The Essence of the Wings
programme.desc: Michael turns leftovers into beauty products at a soap shop, and at a record store, he shows a hip-hop fan how to jump around. Plus, at a children's store, Michael's co-worker learns about the dangers of babysitting.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Total Face Rejuvenation
programme.desc: Michael shocks a receptionist with a medical procedure and later reveals a regenerating piece of gum. Plus, an electrifying trick rewrites history.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Relax the Back
programme.desc: Michael shocks people with every trick in the book, including a voice controlled page turner and outfit changes that almost get him recognized. And later, Michael amazes a trainee with a weightless mattress.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Toasted

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: In Case What?

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: Just a Miker
programme.desc: Find out when Michael's favourite time to avoid contact is, which prank was almost too silly for him to go through with and what bug-infested prop wound up in a dining room.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: Just Made History

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Sports Day

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Hometown Hero
programme.desc: The Chrisleys head to their South Carolina lake house, which also happens to be in the town where Todd grew up. Todd decides the kids are in need of a family history lesson, but the kids end up turning it around on him.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: The Graduates
programme.desc: Chase and Savannah have just graduated high school, and a celebration is in the works. As spirits run high, Todd plans on surprising Savannah by inviting her boyfriend Blaire. She has decided to take a break from him, however, threatening Todd's plans.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Crowning Achievements
programme.desc: Disappointed that he missed Savannah being crowned Miss Tennessee Teen USA, Todd plans a party to celebrate. Later, tension builds when it becomes clear the party is more for Todd than Savannah.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: The Wrath of Todd
programme.desc: When Chase asserts his independence by getting a tattoo of a Bible verse, Todd tries everything in his power to entice Chase to remove it. Meanwhile, Savannah is failing her college Bible class.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Todd Unleashed
programme.desc: Savannah returns home for Jackson's third birthday, she brings her a new puppy. This infuriates Todd. Chase attempts to bond with his dad, purely for his own financial gain.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Lights, Camera, Chase
programme.desc: When Chase scores an internship at a local television station, he is forced to deal with some difficult talent, Todd Chrisley. And, looking for a new hobby, Faye and Julie learn Italian.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Runaway Faye

programme.title: Total Bellas: Bye Bye Bella

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Greece Is the Word
programme.desc: Kenya and Marc announce their divorce. Kandi and Cynthia ask the women to be on their best behavior, but the ask is nearly impossible for Nene and Marlo. After the announcement, Kenya shows up to Greece in good spirits.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: A Greek Tragedy in 6 Acts
programme.desc: After a misunderstanding with Nene, Kenya is ready to put the drama behind her but finds herself in hot water with Cynthia when she asks some inappropriate questions. An intense conversation rehashing old wounds brings Porsha and Nene to tears.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Ruined Peaches
programme.desc: Porsha and Tanya attempt to get all the girls to reconcile. Nene apologizes to Kenya for her hurtful comments. Marlo sends Kenya to her breaking point. On their last day in Greece, Kandi and Cynthia are determined to make up with Nene and Kenya.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: More Love More Problems
programme.desc: After a tumultuous trip to Greece, the women are back home in the ATL. Kandi heads to Chicago for a major acting opportunity, but her absence at home reopens old wounds. Eva debuts her baby to the world while Kenya's marriage hangs in the balance.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Moving Up and Moving On
programme.desc: Kenya takes her separation from Marc one step further, while Cynthia struggles to decide if she should make the big move to Los Angeles. NeNe and Gregg celebrate their 23rd anniversary in a very unconventional way, and Eva moves into her new dream home.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: A Star Is Born
programme.desc: On the day of Kandi's baby shower, Mama Joyce and Todd's old feud reignites. NeNe gets the scoop on some bad press circulating about her, meanwhile Porsha has newfound issues with Kenya. Kandi's baby shower commences with a 'star is born' theme.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: From One Surprise to Another
programme.desc: Cynthia gets some tough love from Kenya after her big argument with Mike. Kenya feels bad about a past mistake and asks Kandi for help to make things right. Drew and Ralph start couples counseling.

programme.title: The Daily Pop
programme.desc: Your go-to for behind-the-scenes scoop, celebrity guests and entertainment conversation.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Fights, Friendships and Fashion Week Part 1
programme.desc: Kim becomes too friendly with Khloe's ex and Khloe must put her foot down and set some boundaries. Kylie prepares to debut her Kylie Cosmetics collaboration with Balmain at Paris Fashion Week.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Fights, Friendships, and Fashion Week Part 2
programme.desc: In the aftermath of their fight, Kim and Kourtney head to Armenia to baptize their kids. After evaluating her lifestyle, Kourtney considers making a major change. Kris is beside herself when she learns that Kylie is too sick to work in Paris.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Date My Daughter
programme.desc: When Kris is at a sexual peak in her relationship, she feels guilty Khloé is going through a dry spell and tries to push her to date again. Scott panics over an upcoming speaking engagement.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: In the Blink of an Eye
programme.desc: Khloè wrestles with whether to send her daughter to Cleveland to visit Tristan. Kylie considers undergoing a scary medical procedure. Scott and Khloè plan their next prank on Kris that will top all previous pranks.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Give Me Some Mo!
programme.desc: The kitchen is more fun when Sunny Anderson and "Beach Bites'" Katie Lee decide who will take on Bobby Flay. Puerto Rican chef Andre Gomez and Dominican chef Ramon Perez duke it out in the kitchen for their shot at the master.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Take A Bao
programme.desc: Suchanan Aksornnan battles Richard Hales and David Alan Grier and Carla Hall must decide who can beat Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: We're All Family Here
programme.desc: Sophie Flay enlists the help of Alton Brown to surprise her father. Jonathan Waxman and Dean Fearing enter the arena to face their protégé Bobby Flay one last time.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Thrown From the Throne
programme.desc: "Chopped" judge Amanda Freitag and walking culinary encyclopedia Simon Majumdar hope they are a winning combination, as Virginia-bred chef Ian Boden matches up with up-and-coming New York City chef Danielle Duran in hopes of slaying the Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Grill Me
programme.desc: "Beach Bites'" Katie Lee and actor Mekhi Phifer grill Louisiana's Chef Nathan Gresham and Arizona's Chef Lisa Dahl to determine who can smoke Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Country Boys in the Big City
programme.desc: Ted Allen pairs up with Anne Burrell to weigh in on which contender has the best chance at handing Bobby Flay a loss.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Surf's Up
programme.desc: Philly's finest, Paras Shah, and Hawaiian chef Sheldon Simeon are brought in to beat Bobby.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Humble Beginnings
programme.desc: Musician and Chef Eugene Jones and up-and-coming chef Christopher Wall enter a culinary skirmish for the chance to take down the legend, Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Don't Be Salty
programme.desc: Bobby Flay makes a dangerous wager with The Kitchen's Geoffrey Zakarian and Sunny Anderson that may cost him the game. Chefs Sammy Monsour and Whitney Thomas are there to rub salt in the wound and try to walk away with a win.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Flying Aubergines
programme.desc: The dynamic duo of Food Network personalities Anne Burrell and Jet Tila team up to take down Bobby Flay. They have the tough job of choosing between pizzaiolo Tony Gemignani and England's own Robert Aikens.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible: Changing with the Times
programme.desc: In Billings, MT, Robert Irvine helps Don Luis Restaurant's widowed owner move past her grief and embrace the future to save her business. Then Robert returns to Perella's Ristorante in Warren, RI, to encourage the owner to change with the times.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Like Father, Like Daughter
programme.desc: Scott Conant is joined by his six year-old daughter Ayla in their quest to beat up on Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Stop, Drop and Roll

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Gods and Aliens
programme.desc: Myths and legends have long been regarded as fantastic stories that describe powerful gods, mutant giants and fearsome monsters. Take a look at why so many cultures separated by large distances tell the same stories.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Aliens and Bigfoot
programme.desc: People on every continent have claimed to see the footprints of Bigfoot. And ancient myths and legends speak of an ape-like giant stalking the earth.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Viking Gods
programme.desc: Odin, Frey and Thor were gods worshipped by the Norse Vikings. Divine or with an extraterrestrial connection, they may have been the reason the Norse were among the most technologically advanced cultures of the ancient world.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Visionaries
programme.desc: Scientists theorize that when mankind encounters extraterrestrials, we'll need to speak to them through the universal language of mathematics and binary code. However, some think that aliens have already been communicating with our greatest minds.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Space Station Moon
programme.desc: It was mankind's finest hour, the greatest technological achievement of the 20th century: the Apollo 11 mission to the moon. The program was short lived, some believe it is because we encountered something, or someone, on the moon.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Science Wars
programme.desc: Nearly every year discoveries are made that require revisions to history books. But there are numerous artifacts that are outright ignored because they don't fit into the accepted scientific paradigm. Explore some of these artifacts.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Russia Declassified
programme.desc: Learn about a secret alliance hidden in plain sight and joint space missions with undisclosed agendas.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Secrets of the Maya
programme.desc: Following the obliteration of the historical record of the Maya in the 16th century, we investigate whether they wiped out evidence that ancient people came to the Americas from all over the world in flying crafts provided by extraterrestrial visitors.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Project Hybrid
programme.desc: We examine the trail of evidence that suggests that extraterrestrials could be altering human DNA and repopulating the Earth.

programme.desc: Find out how automatic transmissions, silver miniatures, hot air balloon baskets and darts are made.

programme.title: How It's Made: All-Terrain Vehicles, Alpine Skis, Laser Cutters and Marble Sculptures
programme.desc: All-Terrain Vehicles, Alpine Skis, Laser Cutters and Marble Sculptures.

programme.title: How It's Made: Leather Wallets, French Horns, Soy Sauce, Children's Ride-On Cars
programme.desc: Learn how leather wallets, French horns, soy sauce and children's ride-on cars are made.

programme.title: How It's Made: Surfboards/ Stickers/ Sandwich Cookies/ Concrete Roofing Tiles
programme.desc: Discover how surfboards, stickers, and concrete roofing tiles are made.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Blood From a Stone
programme.desc: A bystander receives a deadly head injury during a roadside altercation, but the stakes are raised when his body disappears from the scene. Then when a toddler is kidnapped for ransom, Kenda joins forces with an undercover team in a race against time.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Written in Blood
programme.desc: A community is shocked when Antoine McKenzie is brazenly shot outside an auto parts store in broad daylight. But when no witnesses can identify the killer, the only lead left for Lt. Joe Kenda is a final message written in the victim's own blood.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Friends Like This
programme.desc: A young man is found gunned down outside his home after a day spent helping friends move apartments. Sgt. Joe Kenda and Det. John Anderson must determine whether the killer was a complete stranger, a barrio gang member, or a jealous lover.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Confession
programme.desc: After a husband and wife are viciously attacked in their own home, Kenda is on the hunt for a troubled teen whose appetite for violence knows no bounds. Then an unprecedented discovery spurs police to open up a century old murder investigation.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Last Blanco
programme.desc: Michael Blanco never doubted the violent things his mother did were to keep their family safe until one day he learned the truth.

programme.title: A Time to Kill: The Night Creeper
programme.desc: A popular college student is found stabbed to death in her apartment the day after Thanksgiving. Detectives in Jacksonville Beach must piece together her last known movements to pinpoint the time of the murder, and then they must find her brutal killer.

programme.title: Fear Thy Roommate: Doom For Rent
programme.desc: In order to make ends meet, a woman rents out a room in her home to a younger man. But when her finances are jeopardized, she invites another to live with them as well creating a toxic mix of suspicion, accusations, rage, and murder.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Desperate Houseknives
programme.desc: Two families with several children between them get along famously until one of the mothers starts to dictate to the other how she should be raising her kids. Battle lines are drawn, violence flares, and blood runs in the street.

programme.title: A Time to Kill: The Night Creeper
programme.desc: A popular college student is found stabbed to death in her apartment the day after Thanksgiving. Detectives in Jacksonville Beach must piece together her last known movements to pinpoint the time of the murder, and then they must find her brutal killer.

programme.title: Fear Thy Roommate: Doom For Rent
programme.desc: In order to make ends meet, a woman rents out a room in her home to a younger man. But when her finances are jeopardized, she invites another to live with them as well creating a toxic mix of suspicion, accusations, rage, and murder.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Games of Homes
programme.desc: New neighbours disrupt the harmony that has existed between residents for years. Alliances change and terror reigns until a winter storm puts a bloody end to the feud.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: He's Still My Son
programme.desc: Walter Stawicki always tried to protect his son, Ian, from all the evils in the world. But when Ian became a man, and committed an unspeakable crime, Walter realized with horror that he had failed to protect him, and their community, from the true threat.

programme.title: The Last 24: Blood Money
programme.desc: When a woman is murdered in her Alabama home, investigators receive a damning lead pointing to a high-profile suspect. But it will take a decade before their circumstantial murder case has enough grit to go to trial.

programme.title: The Last 24: Deranged and Deadly
programme.desc: In an Atlanta suburb, a young boy is stabbed 18 times when he returns home from school, and his mother's lifeless body is discovered in her bedroom. Police begin the search for the psychopathic killer.

programme.title: Love Kills: Us Against the World
programme.desc: Fate in the form of a framed picture brings Lori and Mike together. Mike's been in prison and wants to start over. When he meets Lori, he wants to take care of her. But when he can't get a job, he goes to the dark side again, taking Lori with him.

programme.title: Love Kills: We Were Like Fire
programme.desc: When Judy and Duane meet, they both long for excitement and to escape the lives they live. Turns out, fate as more in store for them than they desire.

programme.title: Love Kills: It Was All a Big Fantasy
programme.desc: Josh is living his dream of running his family's farm with his girlfriend Donna by his side. But this perfect fantasy is shattered when Josh's mother takes the farm away from them. Revenge is served with a shotgun blast. But who pulled the trigger?

programme.title: Broken Trust: Collateral Damage
programme.desc: When the pillar of a remote Utah community is approached by an old acquaintance with a plan to make money, an exciting partnership is formed. But as their venture falls apart, access to a valuable cache of weapons, becomes a motive for betrayal.

programme.title: Broken Trust: Right-Hand Con-Man
programme.desc: Denver's real estate market is on fire. So when Wall Street veteran Ken Germain promises big bucks everyone jumps aboard, including his right-hand man Colin Collea. But when the dream turns to dust, a raging mob of those betrayed, scream bloody murder.

programme.title: Broken Trust: Suburban Nightmare
programme.desc: A group of suburban teens invite a much-older, rougher young man into their inner circle. They're hoping for thrills and cash. But when these two worlds collide, the crashing result is a murder so vicious and gruesome it haunts the community to this day.

programme.title: Broken Trust: Gold, Guns and God
programme.desc: Allen Keith isn't your typical small-town preacher. He also runs a pawn shop, frequented by gold buyers, gun dealers, and fellow pastors. But the pawnshop turns out to be a far cry from the pulpit, and before long and a stone-cold killer is on the loose.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Hell on Earth
programme.desc: Luther is a minister's son who falls hard for a pastor's daughter, Anita. With love and faith, they make it work until the work runs out. And the crushing blow of failure turns heaven-on-earth into a bloody hell.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Honkytonk Killer
programme.desc: Shorty and Cotton seem perfect for each other, they love dancing, motorcycles and each other. But looks can be deceiving, and after a tragic accident reveals a life of lies and deceit, one of them will ultimately dance with the devil to the death.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Ambition to Die For
programme.desc: Dino's long work hours and missing bail jumper make his wife suspicious. Then a hidden secret is revealed.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Khe Sanh: Marines Under Siege
programme.desc: Six thousand outnumbered marines fight for survival against a vast, highly trained Communist army in a bloody 77 day siege. It's a battle that will shape the course of the war in Vietnam.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: A Culture of Control
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to change the way German people think and feel by creating a new, Nazi form of art and culture. He takes over the film industry and radio stations, giving the Nazis complete control over every image and message his people receive.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Retreat from Reality
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler is determined to fight to the very end, even if it costs millions of Germans their lives. He puts his faith in his the 'Wunderwaffe' and the 'wonder weapons,' including the first ever ballistic missile, the V2.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Himmler's Empire of Terror
programme.desc: Hitler's bid for power depends on his most loyal, and violent supporters: the SS. Using surveillance, detention, and even murder, they defeat political enemies and are most responsible for putting Hitler's deadly policy of racial purity into practice.

programme.title: Hitler: The Fuhrer
programme.desc: A look at the mind of a dictator as Hitler tightens his grip on Germany and turns his sights to conquest. Experts investigate the key skills that enabled him to turn the tables on Europe's foreign leaders.

programme.title: Hitler: The Opportunist
programme.desc: A look at the first three decades of Adolf Hitler's life unveils what transformed a down-and-out Austrian into the undisputed leader of the Nazi Party. We reveal the truth behind Hitler's time serving in World War One.

programme.title: Hitler: The Actor
programme.desc: Investigates Hitler's breathtaking rise from election defeat in 1928 to Germany's Messiah in 1933. Experts analyze his speeches, dissect his PR gift and interrogate the mind of a man who ruthlessly executes his closest comrade.

programme.title: Hitler: The Victor
programme.desc: A look at Hitler's transformation from Fuhrer of the German people into the megalomaniac Nazi Messiah who triggers the global carnage of World War II.

programme.desc: When Pluto's bubble bath gets out of hand, Mickey and Pluto each get stuck in a Giant Bubble and start floating away from the Clubhouse.

programme.title: Chuggington: Frostini's True Calling / Chug Patrol, Out of Control
programme.desc: Young rookie trains learn how to help themselves and the people of their town.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Minnie's Rainbow
programme.desc: Everyone sets out to find the End of the Rainbow.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus: Termy, Come Home! / Rocky the Record Breaker
programme.desc: Explore the world with dinosaur friends in search of the biggest dino of them all!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: There Goes Our Fun! / Don't Wake the Baby!
programme.desc: Mickey invites everyone to join him for Mickey Day at the amusement park. The Happy Helpers babysit the Matisses' new baby boy, Ollie.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Catboy Takes Control / Owlette's Two Wrongs
programme.desc: Romeo builds a remote that can control the PJ Masks. When Night Ninja breaks Owlette’s Flossy Flash art statue, Owlette tries to get back at him by destroying his masterpiece.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: The Magical Baby / Loveys On the Loose
programme.desc: Professor Peacock's latest invention of robotic loveys cause havoc and threaten the babies’ deliveries. Freddy believes baby Narwhal Nathan is magical.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Hug-A-Pip/ Out of Control Tower
programme.desc: A tenacious penguin and a kind hearted flamingo train to be delivery birds.

programme.title: Vampirina: Chrysalis Amiss / Bringing Down the House
programme.desc: While gardening, Vee learns that the cutest creepy crawlies, caterpillars, don't stay caterpillars forever. The B&B gets prepped for the Spook and See, an open house for monsters!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Windy City/ Sham-pooch
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly go on a mission to the Windy City for Bob's kite! Keia is nervous about going to the groomer, so the pugs make it their mission to help her.

programme.title: Bluey: The Show / Ticklecrabs / Escape
programme.desc: The adventures of Bluey, a loveable puppy who lives with her parents and little sister.

programme.title: Bluey: Trampoline/ The Dump/ Zoo
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want to play games on the trampoline with Dad; Dad, Bluey and Bingo head to the dump to throw away their rubbish; Bluey and Bingo play pretend zoo.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: One Small Ruff for Pup-kind / The Lost Bouncy Ball
programme.desc: The pups head to Space Camp to give a dog toy to Chloe; The pups get help to find their bouncy ball.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Bark Bowl / When Hedgie Met Sallie
programme.desc: The pups get trained by a puppyball expert for the puppyball championship. Hedgie helps the pups catch the veggie bandit in Bob's vegetable patch.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Hissy's Kitty/ Polly Wants a Pug
programme.desc: When Bob brings home a lost kitty, Bing and Rolly try find her a home. While in Florida, Bingo and Rolly search for an old friend of Bob's.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Night at the Nursery/ Seas the Day
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy make their first underwater delivery, even though Freddy's not the best swimmer.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Bringing This Family Home/ Flight of the Penguin
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy help fly KC's family home to meet their new baby cousin! The Junior Fliers try to deliver two babies at once.

programme.title: Doc McStuffins: Out in the Wild/ A Whale of a Time
programme.desc: During a camping trip, Doc uses basic first-aid to fix Robo Ron's broken arm. Doc diagnoses her new expandable sponge toy with 'Wanna-Be-Big-Syndrome.'

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Great Shirt Rescue / A Pugatastic Day with Grandma
programme.desc: When Bob loses his lucky shirt before an important meeting, the pups stage a heist to get it back. The pugs are left at Bob's mother's house when he goes out of town.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Art for Pug's Sake/ Winter Wonder-Pug
programme.desc: The pugs try to hang something of Bob's in a famous Italian art museum. Bingo and Rolly look for the first snowflake of the season while helping other animals prepare for winter.

programme.title: Henry Danger: The Bucket Trap
programme.desc: Henry and Charlotte want to tell Jasper that Henry is really Kid Danger. They decide to give Jasper a test secret to prove he's ready.

programme.title: Henry Danger: The Beat Goes On
programme.desc: With the return on Dr. Minyak, Henry finds himself in danger when he realizes that the evil doer has transformed his best friend, Charlotte, into a super strong being set to capture Kid Danger and Captain Man.

programme.title: The Substitute: John Cena
programme.desc: John Cena is transformed by a team of special effects artists to go undercover as a substitute teacher.

programme.title: The Substitute: Jace Norman
programme.desc: Jace Norman is transformed by a team of special effects artists to go undercover as a substitute teacher to surprise a class of unsuspecting students.

programme.title: The Substitute: Asher Angel
programme.desc: Musician and movie star Asher Angel goes undercover as The Substitute. Asher is disguised as a snooty former child genius, an obnoxious world record holder, and an overeager competitive eater.

programme.title: The Substitute: Cooper Barnes
programme.desc: Actor Cooper Barnes is transformed into an archeologist who thinks he's psychic, a wacky motivational speaker, and a paranoid spy.

programme.title: Danger Force: Villains' Night
programme.desc: Danger Force and Captain Man go undercover as bad guys to catch a criminal.

programme.title: Young Dylan: Chasing That Dream
programme.desc: Dylan has trouble adjusting to the Wilson family's rules, leading to confrontation with his uncle that makes him feel unwanted.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Action Packed/ Smarty Pants
programme.desc: Timmy wishes his life could be like an action movie, and that he could know everything.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Scary Godparents - The Fairly Oddparents Halloween
programme.desc: On Hallowe'en, Timmy's boredom transforms everyone into their costumes.

programme.title: The Loud House: Attention Deficit/ Out on a Limo
programme.desc: Clyde's dads give Lincoln more attention than he gets at home. Lincoln wins a ride in a limo and starts to change after soaking up the good life.

programme.title: The Loud House: House Music/ A Novel Idea
programme.desc: Lincoln signs his family up for a talent show and they form a band. It's Dad's annual Take Your Daughter to Work Day so Mom offers to take Lincoln to her work: a dental office.

programme.title: The Loud House: April Fools Rules/ Cereal Offender
programme.desc: Every April Fool’s Day, Luan pranks the entire household, but this year, Lincoln has a plan to not get pranked. The Loud kids make a trip to the supermarket to do the grocery shopping for Mom, but Lincoln has other plans.

programme.title: The Loud House: Lincoln Loud: Girl Guru/ Come Sale Away
programme.desc: For a class assignment, Lincoln and Clyde must start a business, so they decide to sell Lincoln's girl expertise. It's time for the Loud family annual garage sale, and every kid is determined to out-sell the others.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Fast Feud/ Never Friending Story
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne and Sid try to take down the obnoxious burger restaurant that opened up across the street. After picking Par as his new best friend, Bobby realizes he may be in over his head.

programme.title: The Loud House: Roughin' It/ The Waiting Game
programme.desc: Lincoln is worried that he's lost his manliness from growing up with all sisters, so he and Clyde go camping. Lincoln gets Lori a job at a pizza arcade, but when he starts to ask favors of her, Lori gets in hot water.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Patrick's Coupon/ Out of the Picture
programme.desc: Patrick has a coupon for free ice cream, but he'll have to get to the store if he wants to use it. Mr. Krabs buys Squidward's art, but to make a profit on his purchase he'll have to get the artist out of the picture.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob's Place/ Plankton Gets the Boot
programme.desc: When SpongeBob cooks at home, Mr. Krabs' customers leave his restaurant and head for SpongeBob's Place.When Plankton gets kicked out of the house, it's up to SpongeBob to teach him how to win his computer wife back.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Krabby Land/ The Camping Episode
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs builds a children's theme park; Pat and SpongeBob camp in the backyard.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Extreme Sports/ Squirrel Record
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick try to join the extreme sports team the Drasticals. Also, Sandy finds a book of world's records and tries to break them all with SpongeBob's help.

programme.title: It's Pony
programme.desc: A normal girls' life is made extraordinary by her best friend: a hilarious talking pony.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Sponge Who Could Fly
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick come up with numerous ways to fly.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Don't Look Now/ Séance Schméance
programme.desc: SpongeBob holds a séance at the Krusty Krab to learn the recipe for a long-lost sandwich. Then, SpongeBob and Patrick go to see the latest horror film, only to be seemingly stalked by the villain.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Superfriends
programme.desc: Mermaid Man and Barnacle Boy are visiting the Krusty Krab, and they get into an argument about whether or not Barnacle boy should be treated as the kid sidekick anymore.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: All That Glitters/ Wishing You Well
programme.desc: SpongeBob's spatula breaks mid-patty flip; Mr. Krabs installs a wishing well near the Krusty Krab and sends SpongeBob down the well in a bucket to collect the coins.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Selling Out/ Funny Pants
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs sells his restaurant to a big company, but he soon finds retirement boring.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob vs. the Patty Gadget/ Money Talks
programme.desc: SpongeBob competes against a patty-making machine; Mr. Krabs' money tells him to spend it.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Enemy-in-Law/ Mermaid Man and Barnacle Boy VI
programme.desc: Krabs is horrified when he learns that the secret paramour dating his mother is Plankton.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Krusty Krushers/ The Card
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick become wrestlers as part of Mr. Krab's newest get-rich quick scheme.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Krusty Towers/ Mrs. Puff, You're Fired
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs turns the Krusty Krabs into Krusty Towers, an upscale hotel where the customer is king, even the most obnoxious and demanding ones. This pushes Squidward to the point of quitting and returning as a guest to make a series of outrageous requests.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mimic Madness/ House Worming
programme.desc: When worms move in to SpongeBob's holes, it's up to him to hide his disgusting new friends from everyone else.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: He Said She Said/ Attack of the Zombies
programme.desc: Alvin and Brittany give wildly differing versions of why the fire alarm went off at the school. Convinced a zombie invasion is imminent, Alvin and Theodore attempt to protect their loved ones.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Let Them Eat Crumbs/ Who Ghosts There
programme.desc: Eleanor has prepared a cake for a Bake-Off. But Brittany and Alvin come home and eat the cake without knowing its importance! Later, worried that Dave will move the family to his dream house, the boys make the house seem haunted.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Jeanette's Secret Garden/ Treasure Hunt
programme.desc: Jeanette decides to plant a garden on the school grounds, but Bocarter manages to install vending machines instead.When Alvin finds a treasure map in Miss Croner's basement, the Chipmunks set off in search of lost treasure.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Certifiable Super Sitter
programme.desc: Chloe meets Poof for the first time when he comes home from school on Spring Break. Cosmo and Wanda win a free French Dinner, so Chloe gets to babysit Poof and his friends. All goes well until Vicky shows up.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: A New Squid in Town/ Wish Fixers
programme.desc: Mark Chang has to be protected from a forced wedding; Timmy's on a bad wishmaking streak.

programme.title: Back at the Barnyard
programme.desc: Otis and his friends have adventures while trying to protect the farm they live on.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: I Will Survive/ Alvin's Got a Brand New Bag
programme.desc: When Alvin gets hurt, Simon agrees to face off against Derek on a survival reality show, where there's room for only one winner. Alvin accidentally ruins Brittany's favorite new bag and must come up with a way to replace it.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: What a Gem/ Family Spirit
programme.desc: When Alvin sees a sparkling diamond buried in his neighbor's rose garden, he's sure she's responsible for the recent diamond heist. Alvin tries to get out of the annual family day picnic with Dave to go to the big soccer game.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: School Alone/ It Came From Outer Space
programme.desc: Alvin and Brittany get stuck at school with a ghost that roams the halls; Alvin gets some unwanted attention when he claims to have found a meteor.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Baby Mama Drama/ Ballet Boys
programme.desc: Alvin and Brittany learn parenting isn't easy when they have to care for a robot baby for a school assignment.When Alvin's soccer team struggles, the coach makes the team learn ballet to help with their conditioning.

programme.desc: With April's help, the Turtles find out that The Shredder has returned and has hired a scientist to create mutants of his own. Adding to their troubles, New York City is invaded by an extraterrestrial army. The Turtles face their toughest fight yet.

programme.desc: When Anne breaks Hop Pop's favorite cane, she and her friends set out to replace it; After Anne's bedroom floods she has to share a room with Sprig.

programme.title: Amphibia: Contagi-Anne/ Family Shrub
programme.desc: Anne fakes getting sick to get off work, but the rest of the family gets sick. Sprig and Polly think their family history is boring, until they uncover family secrets.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Make Play/ Candace Gets Busted
programme.desc: Candace switches places with a princess who looks just like her, but the ongoing antics of Phineas and Ferb prevent her from enjoying the royal luxuries. Then, Candace inadvertently hosts a giant party while Linda and Lawrence are away on a trip.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Put That Putter Away/ Does This Duckbill Make Me Look Fat?
programme.desc: Candace is sick and recruits Stacy to bust Phineas and Ferb building mini-golf course.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Stanchurian Candidate
programme.desc: When Grunkle Stan decides to run for mayor, Dipper and Mabel have their work cut out for them trying to turn their gaffe-prone uncle into the perfect candidate.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Society of the Blind Eye
programme.desc: The kids, along with Old Man McGucket's help, discover there is a secret society on Gravity Falls.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Love God
programme.desc: Mabel takes matchmaking too far when she steals a love potion from a real Love God.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boss Mabel
programme.desc: When Mabel questions the way Sam runs the Shack, he challenges her to a bet: whoever can make the most money in three days wins the chance to run the Shack however they wish for the rest of the summer.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Rollercoaster/ Candace Loses Her Head
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb decide to beat boredom by building the best roller coaster ever in their backyard, and Candace's birthday present is to get her face carved into the side of Mount Rushmore.

programme.desc: It's Phineas' birthday and Ferb puts together a clip show of the gang's favourite moments. Meanwhile, Agent P must stop Dr. Doofenshmirtz from using his 'non-inator' to pre-empt his brothers' biography from appearing on television.

programme.desc: Anne must learn the value of teamwork to win the town’s annual Bugball game.

programme.title: Amphibia: A Night at the Inn/ Wally and Anne
programme.desc: The Plantars stay at an inn for a night, but Polly discovers the caretakers aren’t what they seem. Everyone calls Anne crazy when she claims to have seen the Moss Man.

programme.title: Movie: Phineas and Ferb: Across the 2nd Dimension
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb team up with Agent P to travel to a parallel universe where they meet alternate versions of themselves.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: I, Brobot
programme.desc: Two stepbrothers build various objects with materials found around their home.

programme.title: Baymax Dreams: Baymax Dreams of Too Many Baymaxes
Phineas and Ferb: I Was a Middle Aged Robot/ Suddenly Suzy
programme.desc: Candace is determined to win this year's father-daughter obstacle course, but unfortunately, Lawrence finds Agent P's lair and his memory is accidentally erased by a gadget.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Run, Candace, Run/ Last Train to Bustville
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb's newest invention is a pair of boots that make the wearer extraordinarily fast. Candace decides to borrow them so she can be in two places at once. Then, the kids decide to create and race a giant hot air balloon at their grandparents.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Fly on the Wall/ My Sweet Ride
programme.desc: Buford removes a part from a tire swing the boys are building and it accidentally shoots a ray that turns Candace into a fly. Meanwhile, Doofenshmirtz is suffering from Evil Scientist’s block.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Sleepwalk Surprise/ Sci-Fi Pie Fly
programme.desc: Candace's plans to hang out with Jeremy are derailed after he becomes interested in playing a new game. Phineas and Ferbs create their own flying saucer to help solve a mystery.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: It's No Picnic/ Steampunx
programme.desc: Two stepbrothers build various objects with materials found around their home.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Great Indoors/ Canderemy
programme.desc: Bad weather spoils Isabella's plan to earn a Fireside Girl patch, so Phineas and Ferb build a huge bio-dome to help her. Then, while Candace is visiting Jeremy, they are zapped by Dr. Doofenshmirtz's 'combine-inator,' literally joining them at the hip.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Lost in Danville/ The Inator Method
programme.desc: Doof leads a Syd Field style seminar for inventors, Candace tries to bust the boys by multi-tasking and the boys create their own solar system.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Return Policy/ Imperfect Storm
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb assemble a crazy array of batting cage and Doof uses an inator to return things to the store. Mom gets a backyard makeover and calls Candace to come see it, while Doof makes a Have-A-Bad-Day-Inator to rain out a tea party.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Bedtime Story

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Forgive Me, Father

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Whose Face Is This, Anyway?

programme.title: The Office: The Client

programme.title: The Office: Performance Review
programme.desc: On performance review day, the employees meet with Michael to discuss their work performances. The only thing on Michael's mind is his own impending review from his boss later that day.

programme.title: The Office: E-Mail Surveillance

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: ...Goodbye
programme.desc: A woman arrives at the station covered in blood, carrying a gun and saying she killed someone. Due to the trauma of what she did, she has forgotten who she is and who the victim is. The team tries to unravel this bizarre case.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Too Good to Be True
