programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Doomsday
programme.desc: When a man is found murdered inside his supposedly impenetrable doomsday fallout shelter, the squad must figure out how and why he was targeted. Jane discovers Korsak is looking into retirement.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: The Best Laid Plans
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a wealthy woman with terminal cancer and only a few months left to live. Maura is torn between the doubts of her scientific mind and the instincts of her heart.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Knockout
programme.desc: A detective and a medical examiner join forces to solve Boston's most twisted cases.

programme.title: Movie: The Sinister Surrogate
programme.desc: A couple finds the perfect surrogate to bear their child but when the birth of a beautiful baby girl happens, the couple learns how deep and dark a mother's love can go.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Step by Step
programme.desc: A wealthy socialite died after falling down stairs, but was it an accident or was it murder? The laws of physics and an accident reconstructionist provided the answer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Blanket of Evidence
programme.desc: When two women are murdered in a state park, Indiana police suspected a serial killer, until they looked at the evidence more deeply and were brought in totally different directions.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Quite a Spectacle
programme.desc: In possibly the strangest case in the history of forensic science, investigators must solve a murder case with a list of evidence consisting entirely of a single squashed tomato left at the crime scene, and tiny reflections of light in a photograph.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Transaction Failed
programme.desc: When a dedicated, well-respected teacher disappeared, police had to determine if she'd gone on vacation without telling anyone, or if she was the victim of foul play. Investigators turned to forensic science, hoping to find the answers they needed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tagging a Suspect
programme.desc: Bomb attacks typically pose a difficult problem for investigators to solve due to the absence of the attacker and a damaged crime scene, but forensic scientists manage to uncover miniscule pieces of plastic that lead straight to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Strong Impressions
programme.desc: The wife of an Air Force officer is found dead in her bed, and authorities initially believe the cause of death to be accidental suffocation by a laundry bag, but further forensic investigation reveals the horrifying truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Four on the Floor
programme.desc: A Native American woman is found murdered less than 10 miles from where a male Native American was murdered two years earlier. Police begin to wonder if a serial killer is on the loose.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Writer's Block
programme.desc: An architect became ill and died just before she was to testify in a criminal trial.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nice Threads
programme.desc: A woman was found dead on the bedroom floor of her apartment. The crime scene yielded little of value, and investigators wondered if they would find enough evidence to make a case, much less catch a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grave Danger
programme.desc: A young man dies in a mysterious car crash, but was it an accident? Forensic science uncovered what really caused the crash, and the truth devastated three different families.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Van-ished
programme.desc: A twelve-year-old girl claimed she had been abducted and sexually assaulted. She recounted what happened in such a flat, unemotional voice that police found it difficult to believe her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Novel Idea
programme.desc: When a frantic call from a man claiming his wife fell down the stairs brings investigators to their home, they are concerned by the unusually large number of bloodstains, and how big they are.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Disrobed
programme.desc: A married couple was found shot to death in their suburban home. Investigators thought they had pin-pointed the killer and his motive until trash revealed the shocking truth and the true killer's identity.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Driven to Silence
programme.desc: An attractive young hairstylist is murdered in her South Carolina salon, and police are at a loss. A tiny hair and a DNA test force police to take another look nearly a decade after the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shoot to Thrill
programme.desc: A teenager returns home after a night out with friends, and discovers his father's body lying in a pool of blood.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Political Thriller
programme.desc: When a Nevada politician dies in the midst of a cutthroat re-election campaign, the only clue investigators have to go on are the tiny punctures on her skin. As they dig deeper, they hone in upon the deceased's husband, a critical care nurse.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cop Out
programme.desc: A college student is found dead and the evidence suggests he knew his killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Summer Obsession
programme.desc: In an affluent suburb of Philadelphia, police are called to the scene of what appears to be an accidental drowning.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Murder on the Menu
programme.desc: When a Philadelphia restaurateur is murdered, the police sift through the usual suspects to find his killer. They soon uncover a sprawling web of deceit and debt.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hot on the Trail
programme.desc: Investigators get involved after a serial arsonist begins starting blazes all over Washington DC.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Good as Gold
programme.desc: Two young women are killed by a mysterious intruder. Investigators hope that his unusual brand of cigarettes and new advances in DNA technology can paint a picture of a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Freedom Fighter
programme.desc: 15 years after a murder and conviction, a letter from prison sets off a chain of events that has investigators exhuming a body and looking for evidence to find out if they convicted the real killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Printed Proof
programme.desc: The murders of two publicly known gay activists led investigators to believe they were victims of a hate-crime. The police soon were able to uncover the real motive behind the murders, and it wasn't hate.

programme.title: Forensic Files: About Face
programme.desc: A skeleton is found on an abandoned plot of land, but before investigators can figure out who killed her, they have to figure out who she is.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dog Day Afternoon
programme.desc: A woman is found dead in her Florida home, and evidence at the scene is scarce. All signs point to burglary. The case goes cold until police get a tip from a canine behaviorist who points them in a different direction.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shattered Innocence
programme.desc: When a prominent criminal defence attorney is found murdered in his own home, police suspect it may have come at the hands of one of his questionable clientele.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Four on the Floor
programme.desc: A Native American woman is found murdered less than 10 miles from where a male Native American was murdered two years earlier. Police begin to wonder if a serial killer is on the loose.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Writer's Block
programme.desc: An architect became ill and died just before she was to testify in a criminal trial.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Key Evidence
programme.desc: An Illinois community is outraged when an off-duty police officer is shot and killed. Police are able to key in on a suspect and with the help of a gunshot residue expert and trace evidence expert make sure their killer pays for his crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Gambler
programme.desc: To solve a case of triple homicide, investigators have to delve into the world of high rollers and offshore betting. With the help of forensics, they are able to bring down a killer who gambled, and lost.

programme.title: Gold Rush: The Return of Freddy Dodge
programme.desc: To save his season, Rick drafts a Gold Rush vet and former member of team Hoffman. Chasing a record-breaking goal, Parker orders an unachievable goal. Tony and Monica fire up their wash plant as they battle to beat Parker to the gold.

programme.desc: Parker returns to the Klondike and records the biggest gold haul of his career. Tony travels deep into the wilderness to resurrect of a gold-catching monster. Rick's forced to find better ground. Fred makes a big change to get on the gold.

programme.desc: In the season finale, it's a race against mother nature at the Blue Room Cut to capitalize on a short weather window before winter closes Team Turin out of Montana. Overcoming early mechanical setbacks, the team perseveres to a surprising end.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Absinthe Makes the Heart Grow Fonder
programme.desc: Tim and his help struggling owners of Missouri Ridge Distillery in hopes of turning it from problem to profit. Mark and Digger confront a shiner who's been edging into their territory. Lance surprises Jeff with an unorthodox moonshine ingredient.

programme.desc: From the castle that inspired the home of an iconic vampire to the market where Santa's devilish sidekick stalks and scares holiday revelers, Josh Gates tells the stories of places where legends never die.

programme.title: The Scott Martin Challenge: SMC Coosa River Challenge
programme.desc: Scott and Dustin are in Alabama fishing spotted bass.

programme.desc: Curtis and his wife visit their friends at Katmai Trophy Lodge in King Salmon, AK.

programme.title: Addictive Fishing: Space Coast Clamity
programme.desc: Capt. Wiggins fishes the Space Coast for redfish and big seatrout with Capt. Jon Lulay.

programme.title: The Next Bite: Trolling for Big Basin Walleyes on Small Wisconsin Lakes
programme.desc: Korey Sprengel and Justin Kohn troll Flicker Shads.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Baddest of the Southeast
programme.desc: The baddest street racers in the Southeast go head-to-head for $16,000 and the title of the region's fastest. Racers from the 405, Mississippi, California and Texas are ready to lay it all on the line but only one driver will walk away with the cash.

programme.title: Chasin' the Sun: Sight Fishing the World's Most Beautiful Beach
programme.desc: Justin shares techniques for catching fish in adverse conditions in the gulf and the bay.

programme.title: Monster Garage: discovery+ 1st Look: Pulsating Power
programme.desc: Sure, people have strapped rockets to cars before, but no one has attempted to propel a 1965 Jaguar with a 12-foot pulse jet.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Viking Sunstone
programme.desc: Josh heads to the U.K. and Norway to unlock the secrets of the Viking Sunstone, a mystic crystal the Vikings used to conquer the sea. Before testing it, he explores a crypt in a Nordic church and descends 1,000 feet into a deserted mine.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Mayan Apocalypse
programme.desc: Josh unearths human skulls and ancient Mayan sacrificial alters in the caverns underneath the jungles and ruins of Mexico while investigating the fall of the remarkable Mayan Empire.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Samurai Sword of Power
programme.desc: Josh explores ancient shrines hidden in the mountains and underground tunnels across Japan in search for the missing mystical Honjo sword. Along the way, Josh learns the ways of the samurai and forges his own samurai sword.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Captain Kidd's Treasure
programme.desc: Josh retraces the footsteps of the legendary Captain Kidd in the hopes of finding his buried treasure. From the East Coast to the Caribbean, the search takes him to a real pirate shipwreck and to the island hideout of the notorious buccaneer.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Plummer's Gold
programme.desc: Josh sets off for gold rush country to search for the lost fortune of a notorious Montana sheriff. During his investigation, Josh explores hidden cave systems and blows open a mine that's been sealed for over a century.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Secrets of the Nazca
programme.desc: Josh flies to Peru to investigate the giant geoglyphs drawn into earth by ancient Nazca tribes. By studying newly found lines and joining a Nazca psychedelic ritual, Josh uncovers the true meaning behind the mysterious tracings.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Lindsey's Story
programme.desc: Lindsey Witte had it all: a white picket fence, a loving husband, a great job. Now her food addiction is threatening to ruin everything and embarks on a weight loss journey to save her life.

programme.desc: Jenna only wanted one thing for her birthday: a car. Away at college, Tyra receives devastating news. Taron and Reanna accuse each other of cheating weeks before she is due. Myrka and Ethan get an ultrasound, but no one gets to know the baby's gender yet.

programme.title: Unexpected: Invitation to the Gender Reveal
programme.desc: Jessica worries Reanna may be going into early labor. Tyra is furious that Julie's internet boyfriend has moved in. Myrka invites her mom to her gender reveal party. Jenna refuses to move her pet rabbit's cage to make room for a new crib.

programme.title: Four Weddings: ...and a Volcano
programme.desc: Brittini seals her vows with a biochemical unity ceremony, while Allie unites guests around a cookie table with 4,000 treats. Jacque turns a fire station into a beach party, while Nicole's DIY creations give her barn reception a vintage feel.

programme.title: Four Weddings: ...and Fist Pumping
programme.desc: Lori's rumba and salsa first dance gets her celebration started; Shannon's 'Jersey Shore' theme has fists pumping all night.

programme.title: Four Weddings: ...and a Grilled Cheese

programme.title: Four Weddings: ...and a Yacht
programme.desc: Melissa makes a dramatic entrance on a yacht, while Sheneka impresses with Hollywood impersonators.

programme.title: Four Weddings: ...and a Wax Museum
programme.desc: Jen's retro-chic themed wedding is at a historic downtown bar, while Brook's party is at a French Quarter wax museum.

programme.title: Four Weddings: ...and an Awkward Pirate

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Three Men and Your Baby
programme.desc: The styles of dance Murr claims to be skilled in. The Joker that recently became a published author.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Damned If You Do

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Up Loser's Creek
programme.desc: Find out which joker ran for Congress as a write-in candidate, which joker was a top-notch salesman before starting the show and who had a job in finance.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Make Womb for Daddy
programme.desc: Find out who scored free sandwiches while shooting at Blimpie; what classic game inspired the 'Guess What' challenge; and what was worse for Q than the pain he endured during his 'childbirth' punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Putting the P in Pool
programme.desc: Find what Sal finds stressful about posing as a cashier; what's Q's favorite on-set beverage; and when did the crew have to arrive poolside to get a front row seat for Joe's pee punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Snow Way Out

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Sneaking Number Twos, Going Number One

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Car Sick
programme.desc: Find out what celebrity Sal wrote fan letters to as a kid, which grocery game is Murr's favourite, how the guys found sloppy Joe and who helped Q's first jeep punishment a milky mess.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dover and Out
programme.desc: The guys survey employees with odd questions, and tonight's loser unveils a mural in a small town whose residents react with big city rage.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Marathon Man

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Guilty as Charged

programme.desc: A shy aspiring songwriter comes out of her shell while working at a popular New York bar.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Flavortown Favorites
programme.desc: Guy Fieri revisits some of the best of Flavortown, starting in San Diego, where an Asian-inspired noodle house is takin' over the neighborhood. In New Orleans, a neighborhood bistro bounces back from Hurricane Katrina.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Small Town Standouts
programme.desc: Guy is hitting up small towns with big flavor. In Parkland, Wisconsin, the he stops at a roadside bar making sandwiches stuffed with brisket and crispy pork belly.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Bite of Britain
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's livin' it up in London, digging into a real-deal regional feast. First, a couple of British buddies smoke up true blue American 'cue. Then, a hip hangout gives classic fish-n-chips a modern makeover.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: From Pork to Po' Boys
programme.desc: Guy Fieri takes a drive down memory lane and revisits a German joint in Brighton, Colo., known for their killer kraut and signature sausage specials. Then, at a stop in the Midwest, a mod-Mex menu is now showcasing mole smothered pork chop.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: What's for Breakfast?
programme.desc: Guy Fieri checks out breakfast places such as a juice bar making bagels from scratch, and a roadhouse mixing Philly food with Southwestern favourites.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Oldies but Goodies
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's hitting up some legit local landmarks. In Des Moines, a historic drive-in is famous for its nearly century-old chili recipe. In Leeds Point, N.J., a scenic seaside joint has served up fresh catch since the '30s.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Island and Desert
programme.desc: Guy finds a desert treasure and island flavour. In Palm Desert, California, he visits a breakfast-lunch cafe dishin' out a righteous rib melt and nostalgic breakfast tarts. Then, in Maui, Hawaii, a funky gluten-free spot makes full-flavoured pizza.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Brunch, Bologna and Burgers
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's grabbing everything from brunch to burgers! In Louisville, Ky., a breakfast-lunch spot crankin' out southern comfort, like lamb grits and fried bologna.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Made to Order
programme.desc: Guy discovers an Italian joint doing lobster ravioli with homemade pasta.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Coast to Coast Classics
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's driving the Camaro all over the nation for some real deal eats.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Sammies and Spice
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's grabbing sandwiches, spice and everything nice, starting with lights-out lamb in Fargo, ND. A funky spot in Sioux Falls, SD, is loading up hand-held flavor bombs, and, in Fairbanks, AK, a wild pizza place is making spicy, sweet pies.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Family Joints
programme.desc: Guy heads out to Minnesota to a cafeteria for some family cooking.

programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's checking out all kinds of food across Flavortown. In Boulder City, Nevada, a chili-churning diner is keeping it all in the family. An old-school breakfast spot has gone big with four locations around Arizona.

programme.desc: In Giada's family, Sundays are set aside for family dinners. For a stress-free, traditional family dinner at home, her menu includes casual but hearty dishes like baby back ribs with spicy peach BBQ sauce and spaghetti with zucchini and squash.

programme.title: Giada Entertains: Pastabilities
programme.desc: Giada De Laurentiis invites friends into her kitchen to create their own pasta shapes from scratch and enjoy a pasta party together. In Italy, many families invent their own pasta shapes, but the recipes often aren't written down and are lost over time.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home: Ladd's Birthday
programme.desc: Ree Drummond and her family are celebrating Ladd's birthday with his favorite foods for dinner. There's a juicy, rare Filet with Roasted Garlic Butter that Ree pairs with Cheesy Au Gratin Potatoes and a fun cowboy-style Chopped Salad Board.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Chuck's Dinner
programme.desc: Ree Drummond's focus is on Chuck, her father-in-law, as the family helps him work cattle and she makes him dinner.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Winter Weeknight Wins
programme.desc: The Kitchen tackles a week's worth of warming winter dinners, starting with Fusilli with Sausage and Oyster Mushrooms. There's also an Easy Beef French Dip with Quick Jus, Sheet Pan Blackened Salmon with Garlicky Kale and Strawberry Crostata for dessert.

programme.title: Guy's Ranch Kitchen: Not Your Grandma's
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is looking for a spin on some classic family recipes. Maneet Chauhan makes Palak Paneer, Ming Tsai creates Cheesesteak Pot Stickers, Jonathan Waxman serves French-inspired Pierogis, and Hunter Fieri cooks up some Fish Tacos.

programme.title: Guy's Ranch Kitchen: Sunday Supper

programme.title: River Monsters: Invisible Executioner

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Dark Waters: What Lies Below: Alaskan Terror
programme.desc: In Alaska, Jeremy Wade sets off in search of two terrorizing aquatic beasts lurking in the Pacific Ocean. While navigating through grizzly territory, he hopes to find to the culprits responsible for the missing fish that have resided there for decades.

programme.title: River Monsters: American Killers
programme.desc: Angler Jeremy Wade normally travels into the most remote regions searching for freshwater monsters, but recently he's been getting reports of killers from an unexpected location, America.

programme.title: River Monsters: Russian Killer
programme.desc: Extreme angler Jeremy Wade heads to Russia's remote Amur River, where the mysterious deaths of three men appear to be linked with a reclusive freshwater giant.

programme.title: River Monsters: Killer Torpedo
programme.desc: Angler Jeremy Wade ventures deep into the heart of Central America in search of a man-sized killer. The creature is said to leap into boats, causing fatal injuries when it knocks fishermen unconscious and smashes their bones.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: A Brother's Lifeline
programme.desc: A couple is torn between two dogs and can't decide which one to bring home. A terrified neighborhood stray in dire need of medical attention results in a difficult rescue for the VRC crew.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: A Clean Slate
programme.desc: Former adopters want to expand their family and adopt Caleb, a puppy that Tania rescued at birth, but Tia is unsure he will fit in with their other dog. When a local gets arrested, his dog is left behind and VRC is called in to help.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Shelter From the Storm
programme.desc: Tia hires three new parolees, but things quickly take a turn for the worse. A rural shelter threatened with closure needs Tia's help. And a family recovering from the loss of their home and dog in a flood comes to VRC looking for a new best friend.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: A Brother's Return
programme.desc: Country Matt returns to help his brother, a new parolee, overcome his fear of dogs. Earl and Tia's daughter-in-law race to save a stray running loose in scorching temperatures. A couple of empty nesters visit VRC in search of a new friend.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Finding a Hero

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Never Let Go

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Young Blood
programme.desc: A new inmate from starts working at VRC, hoping to fill the big shoes that Country Matt left behind. Lizzy and Joe struggle to catch a stray in a nearby neighborhood. A family comes to Villalobos to adopt a dog, hoping to fill a void in their hearts.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: The One
programme.desc: Tia and her staff scramble to coax a scared dog, hiding under a vehicle, to safety. Tania's in-laws are seeking a new addition to their home. Tia's son Moe and his fiancée Lizzy prepare for their wedding day.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Most Valuable Puppy

programme.desc: When the Greens visit the library, the librarian threatens to throw them out if they make a sound. Chip Whistler attempts to make Cricket lose his job by running Big Coffee out of business.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Devil in Our Country
programme.desc: A pleasant Michigan day takes a dark turn when a field hand digs up a human skull in a sprawling backyard. The discovery leaves a tight knit community shaken to its core and questioning whether a killer has penetrated the safety of their town.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Femme Fatale
programme.desc: When a private investigator disappears with tens of thousands of dollars, Florida detectives question whether she's alive and well. But when a buried body is uncovered, they chase a trail of secrets and lies to catch a killer just out of reach.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Buried in the Woods: Grief or Guilt
programme.desc: A beloved high school track star vanishes into the Philadelphia night and those in her innermost circle are eyed as suspects. When a terrifying scene is unearthed in the nearby woods, a family demands answers, but nobody is prepared for the truth. .

programme.title: Dateline: Deadly Conspiracy
programme.desc: When family man Jack Jesse is murdered in his Orange County home, police can't pin down any suspects. It is not until a dedicated detective, a story told at a bar, and a police made mouse trap are all put together that the perpetrators are finally caught.

programme.title: Dateline: The Confession
programme.desc: A teenager confesses to a double murder and is sentenced to life in prison. When a local businessman hears of the case ten-years later, his investigation leads him to believe the teen was coerced into the confession and wrongfully convicted.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: A Twisted Connection
programme.desc: When a suburban mom is murdered in her own home, investigators chase down an elusive killer that no one saw coming.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: When Hate Kills
programme.desc: Police in small town Louisiana investigate the mysterious and brutal murder of a beloved neighbor with no known enemies.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: Killer in Plain Sight
programme.desc: When a trusting, young college student is viciously murdered and her apartment set ablaze, police untangle a web of relationships to find a killer who's dangerously close to home.

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Stovalls
programme.desc: When their brother is convicted of murder, three siblings hatch a deadly plot to avenge him by targeting the star witness in his trial. The plan goes awry when the wrong person is on the receiving end of their vengeance.

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Rosas
programme.desc: After a man is found brutally murdered inside his own bar a murder mystery unfolds over the span of years. Detectives believe it's a business deal gone bad and must remain steadfastly dedicated to the case after hitting several dead ends.

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Suhs
programme.desc: An immigrant family's American dream turns into a nightmare when a devious sister manipulates her younger valedictorian brother into committing murder. When a dark family secret comes to light, it tears the siblings apart.

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Agofskys
programme.desc: Residents of quiet Noel, Missouri are shocked when the local bank is robbed in a brazen nighttime heist. The investigation takes a sinister turn when the bank’s president is found dead and a pair of brothers suddenly come into a lot of cash.

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Vues
programme.desc: When a correctional officer is murdered it seems like an act of vengeance, but soon a love triangle is exposed. After learning his wife is having an affair, a husband plans to kill her lover and enlists the help of his brothers to carry out the task.

programme.title: Movie: Neighbors
programme.desc: A couple's hopes for raising their new baby in a quiet neighbourhood are shattered when a fraternity moves into the house next door. An all-out war is waged when the family finally calls in a noise complaint on the frat boys, who are quick to retaliate.

programme.title: The Simpsons: My Big Fat Geek Wedding
programme.desc: When Skinner gets cold feet before his pending nuptials, Edna calls off the wedding.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Catch 'Em If You Can
programme.desc: When Homer and Marge escape for a romantic getaway, Bart and Lisa try to follow them.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Simple Simpson
programme.desc: Homer becomes a masked avenger after he throws a pie in a cheater's face.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Way We Weren't
programme.desc: Homer recounts the story of his first smooch at summer camp with an anonymous girl.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bart-Mangled Banner
programme.desc: When Bart accidentally moons the American flag, the Simpsons are labelled as unpatriotic.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Fraudcast News
programme.desc: After Mr. Burns is reported dead, the newspapers write scathing articles about him.

programme.title: The Simpsons: All's Fair in Oven War
programme.desc: After Homer suddenly develops a knack for cooking, he unwittingly competes against Marge.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Sleeping With the Enemy

programme.title: The Simpsons: She Used to Be My Girl
programme.desc: Marge runs into her former high school pal Chloe Talbot who is now a famous newscaster.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Midnight Rx
programme.desc: Homer, Grampa, Apu and Flanders travel to Canada to buy drugs with fake health care cards.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer and Ned's Hail Mary Pass
programme.desc: Homer inadvertently stumbles across a new career as a 'victory dance' choreographer.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Pranksta Rap
programme.desc: Bart sneaks out to a 50 Cent concert and fakes his own kidnapping to get out of trouble.

programme.title: Family Guy: Adam West High
programme.desc: When Brian's proposition to rename Quahog's high school 'Adam West High,' to honour the late Mayor West, is successful, he feels encouraged to run for office as Quahog's new mayor. The race takes a turn when Quagmire campaigns against Brian.

programme.title: Family Guy: Yacht Rocky
programme.desc: When the brewery announces it will be firing one employee, Peter is nervous he will be the one let go. In order to calm his nerves, the family departs on a Yacht Rock cruise that doesn’t go as expected.

programme.title: Archer: Archer 1999: Dining With the Zarglorp
programme.desc: Deep in space, Archer and the crew encounter a terrifying cosmic beast. Even deeper, they encounter a self-aggrandizing life coach.

programme.title: Archer: Archer 1999: Mr. Deadly Goes to Town
programme.desc: Archer and the crew pick up a hitchhiker and try to convince him to turn his life around.

programme.title: Movie: Bad Times at the El Royale
programme.desc: In 1969 several strangers have a chance meeting at Lake Tahoe's El Royale, each of them holding on to a dark past. Over the course of the night, their secrets meet and unravel, sending them all into chaos.

programme.title: Movie: Sausage Party
programme.desc: A sausage named Frank lives in a supermarket with his friends. He is chosen along with his girlfriend, but then discovers the horrifying truth: groceries are eaten by the people. Along with his friends, he tries to escape their fate and warn the others.

programme.title: Movie: Neighbors
programme.desc: A couple's hopes for raising their new baby in a quiet neighbourhood are shattered when a fraternity moves into the house next door. An all-out war is waged when the family finally calls in a noise complaint on the frat boys, who are quick to retaliate.

programme.title: Movie: 22 Jump Street
programme.desc: Two police officers go undercover as students at the local college in order to take down a secret drug ring. Their partnership is challenged as the two fall into their respective niches: one in the bohemian arts scene and the other on the football team.

programme.title: Movie: The Patriot
programme.desc: A pacifist is drawn into the American War of Independence against his will in order to protect his enlisted son.

programme.title: Movie: The Transporter
programme.desc: An outlaw finds his life becoming all the more dangerous when he turns against a gang of criminals.

programme.title: Movie: Transporter 2
programme.desc: When the son of a wealthy family is kidnapped, their driver, an ex-special forces operative, must use all of his skills to bring the boy back safely.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show: NYE
programme.desc: Graham welcomes Tom Hanks, Emily Blunt, Jamie Dornan, Hugh Fearnley-Whittingstall, Nish Kumar, Jessica Chastain and Sophie Ellis-Bextor.

programme.title: Movie: The Transporter
programme.desc: An outlaw finds his life becoming all the more dangerous when he turns against a gang of criminals.

programme.title: Movie: Transporter 2
programme.desc: When the son of a wealthy family is kidnapped, their driver, an ex-special forces operative, must use all of his skills to bring the boy back safely.

programme.title: Hidden Habitats: Australia's Red Centre
programme.desc: The Red Center of Australia is one of the most inhospitable environments on Earth yet it is filled with wildlife. The secret to Australia's diversity is its rainforest past.

programme.title: The Hunt: Living With Predators: Conservation
programme.desc: Visit the frontline of the conflict with the world's top predators and meet the scientists fighting to save them. Crossing five continents and combining natural history footage with human drama, this episode checks the pulse of the earth's iconic animals.

programme.title: The Hunt: The Hardest Challenge
programme.desc: The contests between predators and prey are the most dramatic events in nature. The premiere episode reveals the extraordinary range of techniques predators use to catch their prey.

programme.title: The Hunt: In the Grip of Seasons: Arctic
programme.desc: This episode looks at the challenges of hunting in the Arctic, the most seasonal place on Earth. To a predator, seasonal change is a problem; it means that all the parameters of the hunt change too.

programme.title: The Hunt: Hide and Seek: Jungles
programme.desc: Follow tigers, harpy eagles, chimpanzees, army ants and other predators as they rise to the challenge of hunting within the forest. The prize for succeeding at nature's great game of hide-and-seek is one worth winning.

programme.title: The Hunt: Hunger at Sea: Oceans
programme.desc: This episode follows blue whales, sharks, sea lions and dolphins to reveal the strategies they use to hunt for prey. The ocean is an immense wilderness; predators face an endless search to find and catch food, yet the ocean is home to remarkable hunters.

programme.title: The Hunt: Nowhere to Hide: Plains
programme.desc: The open arenas of grassland and desert make up half of all land on our planet. In these exposed habitats, predators like cheetahs, bald eagles and lions can usually see their prey. But it works both ways: their prey can see them too.

programme.title: The Hunt: Race Against Time: Coasts
programme.desc: The coast is the only place on the planet where predators from air, land and sea come together; powered by the tides and thrashed by waves, this is a world of continuous change. Opportunities never last long, so hunters are always in a race against time.

programme.title: Planet Earth: From Pole to Pole
programme.desc: The ultimate portrait of our planet looks at the key factors that shape our natural history. In the Arctic spring, a mother polar bear and cubs have two weeks to cross the frozen sea. Time-lapse cameras capture the transformation created by floods.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Mountains
programme.desc: A tour of the mountain ranges reveals how animals rise to the challenge of mountain life. The snow leopard finds habitat in the largest glaciers of the world.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Seasonal Forests
programme.desc: From the evergreen forests of the frozen north to the deciduous dry forests of the Equator, discover the greatest woodlands on Earth.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Ocean Deep
programme.desc: In the ocean, life goes to extraordinary lengths to survive this immense realm. A 30-tonne whale shark gorges on a school of fish. Deep sea octopus fly in the abyss and vampire squid use bioluminescence to create a colour display.

programme.title: Drugs, Inc.: The Fix: Chicago Crack
programme.desc: The business of crack cocaine takes its toll worldwide.

programme.title: Drugs, Inc.: The Fix: Building an Empire
programme.desc: Vancouver’s suburbs hide a drug trade, spawning a gang rivalry.

programme.title: Detroit Gang Squad
programme.desc: An elite police unit are given the task of turning the tide in the war against street gangs who are armed with automatic weapons and threaten the lives of teens in Detroit.

programme.title: Bloods and Crips: L.A. Gangs
programme.desc: NGC takes viewers to the streets of South Central Los Angeles as it charts the rise of two of the most notorious gangs in America: the Bloods and the Crips.

programme.title: Inside the American Mob: Becoming Boss
programme.desc: In the '70s John Gotti fights to become boss; in the 80s Whitey Bulger terrorizes Boston.

programme.title: Inside the American Mob: Going Undercover

programme.title: Inside the American Mob: Escaping the Mob

programme.title: Inside the American Mob: Fighting the Mob

programme.desc: When an 11-year-old Arizona girl vanishes while waiting for an ice cream truck, it's clear she's been abducted. The search for her leads to a trail of suspects, making it the largest missing child investigation in Arizona history.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Suburban Secrets
programme.desc: When doting mother, Cheryl Coker, vanishes from Riverside, Ohio on October 2nd 2018 numerous search efforts come up empty. But as police take a closer look at the case, they uncover some disturbing information.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: The Cheerleader and the Hitman
programme.desc: When a widower and father of three is found dead outside his Long Island home, police have reason to believe shady business dealings may have caused his murder. But then a tip leads to three unlikely suspects, exposing dark family secrets.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Without A Trace
programme.desc: In 1984 ten-year-old Kevin Collins disappears on his way home and the city of San Francisco is galvanized in an effort to find him. With few leads to go on, Kevin's case sheds light on hundreds of other kids who have vanished without a trace in the U.S.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Burned Alive
programme.desc: On a back road in Mississippi, a popular 19-year-old girl is set on fire and left to burn alive. Her last words lead detectives down a road of dead ends and the case goes cold until a special agent taps into her location data and finds a suspect.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Law and Murder
programme.desc: A double murder involving the family of a federal judge will lead the FBI, US Marshals and Chicago PD on an investigation of epic proportions. But when law enforcement finds the end of the trail, they learn the death count may climb higher.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: The Grim Sleeper
programme.desc: A lone survivor is the only witness who can help police track down a serial killer known as the Grim Sleeper, who preys on women in South Central Los Angeles. After decades of searching, police hone in on an unlikely suspect.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Where Is Baby DeOrr?
programme.desc: A young couple enjoys an impromptu camping trip in Leadore, Idaho, until their 2-year-old son suddenly vanishes. Investigators and private detectives work around the clock to find the missing boy, only to point the finger back at the parents.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Last Ride Home
programme.desc: A wealthy labour lawyer shoots his high profile wife from the back seat of a car, and questions are raised about whether it was an accident or plain murder.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Letter From San Quentin
programme.desc: Kevin Cooper was sentenced to death for the murders of four people in the Chino Hills massacre of 1983, but as investigators look back at the DNA evidence, more questions are raised about Cooper's possible innocence.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Was Kevin Cooper Framed?
programme.desc: '48 Hours' investigates whether new DNA evidence can save the life of a man on death row for killing four people in California. Twenty years ago he wrote '48 Hours' claiming he was framed, and new tests may answer that question.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Hollywood Ripper
programme.desc: Four young women attacked, only one survivor; Maureen Maher has been on the trail of serial killer Michael Gargiulo for more than a decade. Learn how she helped crack one of the cases.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Hollywood Ripper on Trial
programme.desc: The story of Michael Gargiulo, a serial killer known as 'The Hollywood Ripper.' Michael is accused of killing three women, and attempting to kill another who lived to bear witness against him.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: The Thanksgiving Ambush
programme.desc: Rob and Brenda Andrew are a devout couple, living in the Bible Belt of Oklahoma City. But their world is shattered when both of them are shot during a violent home invasion. The mastermind will prove to be closer than anyone ever imagined.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: The Body on Bowden Road
programme.desc: When 20-year-old Stephanie Shea Graham is found murdered on a desolate road, detectives gather clues and question all those closest to her. When the truth is finally revealed, the identity of her killer will prove to be more shocking than ever imagined.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: Maine Murder Mystery
programme.desc: Mike and Valerie Miller are a beloved couple in the tiny town of Webster Plantation, Maine. When they are found shot dead in their own home, authorities must probe a list of suspects that includes their own flesh and blood.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: The Lieutenant of Lampson Road
programme.desc: When a firefighter is gunned down in his driveway, everyone in his life becomes a prime suspect.

programme.title: Betrayed: The Body in the Cornfield
programme.desc: Barbara Keim is juggling two ex-husbands and a rebellious teenage daughter with a questionable circle of friends. When Barbara goes missing, her sisters fear the worst.

programme.title: Betrayed: Keep Your Friends Close…
programme.desc: 32-year-old Anna Lisa Raymundo seems to have it all a skyrocketing career, a beautiful home and a loving boyfriend. But a secret betrayal cuts her dreams of a family short.

programme.title: Betrayed: Killing with Kindness
programme.desc: Kind-hearted cashier Elizabeth Grosskopf scoops up human strays like puppies until one wants more than just food and shelter, but also her life.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Hitler: The Benchmark of Terror
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler murders six million Jews and invades peaceful countries brutally killing anyone in his way. Find out what could turn a high school dropout into the most evil dictator the world has ever seen.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Papa Doc: Haiti's President for Life
programme.desc: Francois Duvalier trained as a medical doctor, but his healing touch was lost as he became the ruthless dictator 'Papa Doc.' The tools of his tyranny were violence and Voodoo. He killed 30,000 people, and kept a nation in fear of his mystical powers.

programme.title: Colombian Rambo
programme.desc: In 1980 the trickle of cocaine coming in to Florida suddenly becomes a flood and drug wars erupt on the streets. Carlos Lehder is behind it all. The DEA must take him down before he destroys the USA with the drug he calls Latin America's 'atomic bomb.'

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Video Rental Store
programme.desc: In 1975, Michael Brown killed Richard Sullivan during a robbery. Brown was convicted, and while in prison married a woman named Donna. He soon escaped so they could start a new life together. They lived for more than 15 years without incident.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Family Coming After Me
programme.desc: After a fight in a mall, Eric Quesada murders his ex-best friend in a drive-by shooting. He goes on the run to Mexico, where he is caught by Mexican officials. Quesada spends two years fighting extradition before being sent back to the US.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Shot Above a Deli
programme.desc: What was planned as an easy robbery turns into The Carnegie Deli Murders. Sean Salley shoots an actress and her friends above a deli in New York, and flees to New Orleans and then to Miami where he plans to leave the country for good.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Caught Via Email
programme.desc: When Edward Roberson and two fellow inmates went to the showers, they didn't come back. Breaking out, the three scaled the fences and made a run for it. Roberson has escaped and now has stolen guns, in a stolen car running for his life.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Lot of Pot
programme.desc: Moving small amounts of pot from Mexico lead to a bustling operation for Steve Lamb. By age 20, Lamb was part of a group of traffickers who made millions. Eluding the police, Lamb moved bails of marijuana across the sea until caught in a sting operation.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Shot Above a Deli
programme.desc: What was planned as an easy robbery turns into The Carnegie Deli Murders. Sean Salley shoots an actress and her friends above a deli in New York, and flees to New Orleans and then to Miami where he plans to leave the country for good.

programme.title: Nazi Death Squads: Judenfrei
programme.desc: After the EZG's intervention, Romania, Bulgaria, Hungary and the Baltic states are declared "Judenfrei": free of Jews.

programme.title: Nazi Death Squads: Funeral Pyres
programme.desc: Faced with the advancing Soviet troops, Nazi Germany decides to have the bodies of death camp victims dug up and burned in graves.

programme.title: Nazi Death Squads: Mass Graves
programme.desc: The armies of the Third Reich invaded the USSR in 1941. Mobile commandos, the Einsatzgruppen, were following their advance to Stalingrad with the mission of eliminating all Jews on the conquered territories.

programme.title: Nazi Death Squads: Time of Reckoning
programme.desc: After being judged at the Nuremberg trials, the majority of those responsible for the murders of nearly 1.5 million Jews would walk free in the 1950s.

programme.title: Patriots Rising: The American Revolution: Rise of the Patriots
programme.desc: Five unsung patriots strike pivotal blows for American liberty as unrest between Britain and the colonies explodes into a war for independence.

programme.title: Patriots Rising: The American Revolution: The Empire Fights Back
programme.desc: Time after time, American independence seems like a lost cause as George Washington's Continental Army teeters on the brink of annihilation. The heroics of five little-known patriots help the colonies live to fight another day.

programme.title: Patriots Rising: The American Revolution: Return of the Rebels
programme.desc: The American Revolution seems doomed as the British army launches a bold new campaign in the south, but five unsung patriots help reverse the course of the war and shock the world.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: In 1941, Hitler has thrown himself into a fight to the death against Stalin. Two decades earlier, in 1917, Joseph Jughashvili from Georgia is a member of Lenin's Bolshevik Party, who has just seized power in Russia. The country is torn by civil war.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: After blocking the Germans right outside of Moscow, Stalin now faces Hitler's second assault. The world's fate will be decided in Stalingrad. Like in Leningrad, men, women, and children are plunged into hell and sacrificed.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: The Soviets continue on the path to towards liberation. On the road to Berlin, they discover the horror of Hitler's extermination camps. Fifteen years earlier, Stalin transformed his country using every means at his disposal.

programme.desc: Tamara Day steps in to finish the renovation of a 1890s Craftsman-style home. This home was previously ripped down to the studs by a contractor before it was abandoned.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Book Lamps and Bubble Glass
programme.desc: Renovations on the 1890s Craftsman-style home continues as Tamara enlarges the master bedroom and creates a beautiful study. She runs into trouble when the antique tiles for the bathroom floor are not salvageable. Tamara finds a way to re-use old glass.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Raise the Roof
programme.desc: Tamara gets creative renovating an expansive 1950s ranch-style home. She updates the exterior with faux stone and adds another floor to the 3,000-square-foot home, but rain and an old fireplace force her to rethink her plans and budget.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Stairway to Master Suite Heaven
programme.desc: Tamara Day uses her 1,400-square-foot second-story addition to create three new bedrooms in a 1950 ranch home.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: All About the Island
programme.desc: Tamara tackles a large 1905 colonial with seven sun porches. She overhauls an ugly kitchen and a dining room with tacky orange carpet, but unsupported floors and a strange noise during demo slow her plans and may cost her big money.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: A Closet Fit for a Queen
programme.desc: Tamara creates a 900-square-foot master suite and converts one of the home's seven sun porches into a closet. However, her budget takes a hit when she needs to install a new HVAC unit and her plan to save a vintage fireplace might be out of gas.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Double Dutch Dilemma
programme.desc: Tamara gets the opportunity to renovate a French chateau she's wanted to tackle for years. She finds that a recent renovation left the kitchen looking outdated and tacky, but she's determined to create a home full of authentic details.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Trouble With Cobbles

programme.desc: Chance is worried after his phone pocket-likes a controversial post.

programme.desc: A team of young practical jokers pull off hilarious pranks in this hidden camera series.

programme.desc: Chance tries to figure out why he's the only one of his friends invited to a classmate's party, while the gang pulls off a prank that makes Herman's creepy life-size doll appear to come to life just in time to scare a babysitter.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: A Star is Not Born
programme.desc: Bailey is assigned to direct the school play, but worries when Chance’s terrible acting threatens to ruin the entire production.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Where's Perry?

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Primal Perry
programme.desc: When Perry comes face to face with an Australian platypus hunter who wants to destroy him, he must find a way to defeat this villainous foe.

programme.desc: When someone tampers with Mabel's life-size wax statue, she and Dipper set out to find the culprit. Meanwhile, Grunkle Stan mourns over the loss of his wax doppelganger.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Little Dipper
programme.desc: Dipper feels self-conscious that Mabel is taller than him and is becoming the alpha twin, so he seeks out a magic way to grow himself the same height. Lil' Gideon takes advantage of Dipper's and Mabel's height discrepancies.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Time Traveler's Pig
programme.desc: When Dipper wishes he could go back in time and undo a mistake he made, he discovers there is a time machine that can help him do just that. Meanwhile, it's love at first sight for Mabel when she wins a pet pig at the fair.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Carpet Diem
programme.desc: Mabel finds a way to swap minds with Dipper and the townsfolk, so she uses her new found ability to make a difference in people's lives.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Land Before Swine
programme.desc: When a prehistoric beast snatches Mabel’s beloved pig Waddles, the Pines family must journey to a land trapped in time to rescue him.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Blendin's Game
programme.desc: Blendin Blandin returns to face off with Dipper and Mabel in a futuristic battle that could trap them forever in time jail.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Inconveniencing
programme.desc: When Dipper tries to impress Wendy by acting older than he really is, he's invited to join a group of teenagers on a trek that leads to an old abandoned convenience store that could be haunted.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boss Mabel
